subject: session date
fact: The events took place on June 7th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jun 7th, 2026

subject: rogue mind flayer's lair
fact: The party stood before two sealed doors deep within the rogue mind flayer's lair.
source_quote: The party stood before two sealed doors deep within the rogue mind flayer's lair

subject: Arrizz
fact: A faint and haunted voice drifted through the stone from behind one of the doors.
source_quote: a faint and haunted voice drifted through the stone — the voice of Arrizz

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz stated that he was weak once and would never be again.
source_quote: "I was weak once, never again."

subject: door opening
fact: The party chose to open the left door first.
source_quote: The party chose to open the left door first

subject: Daein opens door
fact: Daein eased the left door open with careful, practiced silence.
source_quote: Daein eased it open with careful, practiced silence

subject: left room
fact: The room contained a grim tableau with six Githyanki gathered around Arrizz.
source_quote: What greeted them on the other side was a grim tableau

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz had been bound to a post in the room.
source_quote: Arrizz, who had been bound to a post

subject: Githyanki
fact: Five Githyanki warriors clad in ornate, exotic armor were present.
source_quote: five warriors clad in ornate, exotic armor

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: A Githyanki knight bearing a massive silvery greatsword was present.
source_quote: a formidable knight bearing a massive silvery greatsword

subject: Arrizz
fact: The Githyanki poked and prodded Arrizz with morbid curiosity and revulsion.
source_quote: They poked and prodded him with equal parts morbid curiosity and revulsion

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz had vivid, colorful scars on his face from a disease he suffered long ago.
source_quote: the vivid, colorful scars that still marked his face from a disease he had suffered long ago

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki are ancient enemies of mind flayers.
source_quote: ancient enemies of mind flayers

subject: Githyanki
fact: The Githyanki are described as arrogant, warlike, and deeply hostile to anyone beneath them.
source_quote: arrogant, warlike, and deeply hostile to anyone they deemed beneath them

subject: Arrizz
fact: It was clear that Arrizz would not survive much longer in Githyanki custody.
source_quote: It was clear that Arrizz would not survive much longer in their custody

subject: battle eruption
fact: The party surged into the room and the battle erupted in a storm of steel and sorcery.
source_quote: They surged into the room, and the battle erupted in a storm of steel and sorcery

subject: Daein
fact: Daein led the charge and cut into the nearest warrior with swift, decisive strikes.
source_quote: Daein led the charge, cutting into the nearest warrior with swift, decisive strikes

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim summoned a swirling host of spectral guardians that radiated outward.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon divine power, summoning a swirling host of spectral guardians that radiated outward

subject: spectual guardians attack
fact: The spectral guardians scorched the Githyanki with holy energy.
source_quote: scorched the Githyanki with holy energy

subject: spectral guardians slow enemies
fact: The spectral guardians slowed those who could not resist the sacred force.
source_quote: slowing those who could not resist the sacred force

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas moved with hunter's precision and marked her targets.
source_quote: Akritas moved with hunter's precision, marking her targets

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas cut down the Githyanki targets one by one.
source_quote: cutting them down one by one

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was too large to squeeze fully into the narrow hallway.
source_quote: too large to squeeze fully into the narrow hallway

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear struck at whatever foes it could reach from the doorway.
source_quote: struck at whatever foes it could reach from the doorway

subject: Githyanki Knight
fact: The Githyanki Knight used bursts of magical teleportation to reposition across the battlefield.
source_quote: The knight used bursts of magical teleportation to reposition across the battlefield

subject: Knight attacks Owlbear
fact: The Githyanki Knight delivered punishing blows against the Owlbear.
source_quote: delivering punishing blows against the Owlbear

subject: Knight teleports away
fact: The Githyanki Knight slipped out of reach after attacking.
source_quote: before slipping out of reach

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Githyanki warriors attempted to break Bramgrim's concentration.
source_quote: Warriors attempted to break Bramgrim's concentration

subject: Daein critical blow
fact: Daein unleashed a flurry of additional attacks fueled by adrenaline.
source_quote: Daein, fueled by a surge of adrenaline, unleashed a flurry of additional attacks

subject: Daein fells warrior
fact: Daein landed a devastating critical blow that felled one warrior.
source_quote: landing a devastating critical blow that felled one warrior

subject: Daein wounds warrior
fact: Daein wounded another warrior with the same flurry.
source_quote: and wounded another

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim conjured a floating spectral weapon to harry the remaining enemies.
source_quote: Bramgrim conjured a floating spectral weapon to harry the remaining enemies

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon dark necrotic power to sap the strength of a wounded foe.
source_quote: called upon dark necrotic power to sap the strength of a wounded foe

subject: Knight flees
fact: The Githyanki Knight cast a powerful planar spell and vanished entirely from the material world.
source_quote: he cast a powerful planar spell and vanished entirely from the material world

subject: Knight's threat
fact: The Githyanki Knight left behind only the echo of a threat that the party had made a permanent enemy.
source_quote: leaving behind only the echo of a threat that the party had made a permanent enemy

subject: Githyanki defeated
fact: The Githyanki warriors were defeated.
source_quote: With the warriors defeated

subject: Arrizz freed
fact: The party freed Arrizz from his bonds.
source_quote: the party freed Arrizz from his bonds

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was not well after being freed.
source_quote: He was not well

subject: Arrizz
fact: Demonic madness seeping through the Underdark had taken hold of Arrizz.
source_quote: The demonic madness that had been seeping through the Underdark had taken hold of him

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz's words were erratic and paranoid.
source_quote: his words were erratic and paranoid

subject: Arrizz fed mushroom
fact: The party fed Arrizz a piece of their magical mushroom.
source_quote: The party fed him a piece of their magical mushroom

subject: Arrizz
fact: The old calculating gleam returned to Arrizz's eyes after eating the mushroom.
source_quote: the old calculating gleam returned to his eyes

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz explained he decided the surface world was not for him after their last adventure.
source_quote: he had decided the surface world was simply not for him

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz found the surface world too bright and full of people smiling when they weren't happy.
source_quote: too bright, too full of people smiling when they weren't happy

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz found the surface world far too hard on his eyes.
source_quote: and far too hard on his eyes

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz had returned to the Underdark and been captured by a Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: He had returned to the Underdark, been captured by the Githyanki patrol

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz nearly ended up with his brain harvested as a key for one of the lair's sealed doors.
source_quote: had nearly ended up with his brain harvested as a key for one of the lair's sealed doors

subject: Arrizz agrees to travel
fact: Arrizz agreed to wait nearby and travel with the party for a time.
source_quote: Arrizz agreed to wait nearby and travel with the party for a time

subject: Arrizz condition
fact: Arrizz agreed to travel on the condition that the party owed him a beer.
source_quote: on the condition that they owed him a beer

subject: second sealed door
fact: The party approached the second sealed door to the northeast.
source_quote: Turning their attention northeast, the party approached the second sealed door

subject: second sealed door
fact: The second door's surface was thick with fungus and slick moss.
source_quote: its surface thick with fungus and slick moss

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur led the investigation of the second door.
source_quote: Felkur led the investigation

subject: Felkur detects odor
fact: Felkur detected a faint, acrid odor hanging in the air.
source_quote: detecting a faint, acrid odor hanging in the air

subject: second door opened
fact: The party pushed the second door open.
source_quote: The party pushed the door open

subject: second room
fact: The second room was a stale, oppressive chamber coated in moss and fungus.
source_quote: a stale, oppressive chamber coated in moss and fungus

subject: second room
fact: Several large orbs were bobbing gently in the dim air of the second room.
source_quote: with several large orbs bobbing gently in the dim air

subject: brain basin
fact: Another brain basin sat within the second chamber.
source_quote: Another brain basin sat within

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur discovered a humanoid shape buried beneath a mound of debris and muck.
source_quote: Felkur discovered a humanoid shape buried beneath a mound of debris and muck

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: The party uncovered an unconscious Duergar.
source_quote: They uncovered an unconscious Duergar

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum introduced herself after stirring awake.
source_quote: introduced herself as Thera Grabelthum

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera claimed she was an innocent traveler waylaid by a Githyanki patrol.
source_quote: She spun a tale of being an innocent traveler waylaid by a Githyanki patrol

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: The party's instincts told them something was off about Thera's story.
source_quote: but the party's instincts told them something was off

subject: Thera intimidated
fact: Thera's story began to crack under firm and pointed intimidation.
source_quote: Under firm and pointed intimidation, Thera's story began to crack

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera admitted she had been working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network.
source_quote: she admitted she had not simply been passing through. She had been working as a spy for the Zhentarim Black Network

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera had been collecting intelligence on Sporedome and other Duergar operations.
source_quote: collecting intelligence on Sporedome and other Duergar operations

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera refused to say more about her employers.
source_quote: She refused to say more about her employers

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera cited a fear of what her employers would do to her if she talked.
source_quote: citing a very reasonable fear of what they would do to her if she talked

subject: ambush
fact: The chamber erupted into chaos before the party could press further.
source_quote: Before the party could press further, the chamber erupted into chaos

subject: Githyanki Warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a coordinated ambush.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors burst from the muck in a coordinated ambush

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera turned invisible and slipped away into the darkness.
source_quote: while Thera turned invisible and slipped away into the darkness

subject: Ambush targets Owlbear
fact: The Githyanki warriors struck hard and fast, targeting the already-battered Owlbear.
source_quote: targeting the already-battered Owlbear

subject: Akritas cuts warrior
fact: Akritas cut down one of the warriors.
source_quote: Akritas cut down one of the warriors

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: A grotesque creature emerged from the fallen warrior's skull.
source_quote: From the fallen warrior's skull, a grotesque creature emerged

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The creature was a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs.
source_quote: a pulsating brain walking on four feline legs

subject: Intellect Devourer
fact: The Intellect Devourer had been lurking inside the Githyanki all along.
source_quote: an Intellect Devourer that had been lurking inside the Githyanki all along

subject: Intellect Devourer attacks
fact: The Intellect Devourer immediately turned its psychic power on the Owlbear.
source_quote: It immediately turned its psychic power on the Owlbear

subject: Owlbear stunned
fact: The Intellect Devourer unleashed a devastating mental blast that left the Owlbear stunned and helpless.
source_quote: unleashing a devastating mental blast that left the great beast stunned and helpless in the middle of the fight
